patches.hypothesis: The test expects the method to return true when the input attribute has a prefix that matches the prefix of the given name, but the method was not handling this case properly.
patches.changes:
- if (testPrefix == null) return false;
+ if (testPrefix == null || equalStrings(testPrefix, nodePrefix)) return true;
patches.diff:
- if (testPrefix == null) return false;
+ if (testPrefix == null || equalStrings(testPrefix, nodePrefix)) return true;
